# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any
    
    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', description: 'The URL of the build artifact.')
        choice(name: 'DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT', choices: ['production1', 'production2'], description: 'Choose a production server to deploy on')
    }
    
    stages {
        stage('Checkout'){
            steps{
                echo "Artifact URL is ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                echo "Deploying to environment ${params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT}"
            }
        }
        
        stage('Download Artifacts') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def url = params.ARTIFACT_URL
                    def filename = url.split("/").last()  // assuming URL contains the name of file at last part
                    sh "curl -o ${WORKSPACE}/${filename} ${url}"  
                }    
            }
        }
        
        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            environment { 
                SERVER = "" // set this as per your production servers' IPs or hostnames. 
            }
            
            steps {
                script {
                    def deployScript = """
                        scp ${WORKSPACE}/${filename} user@${env.SERVER}:/path/to/deploy/on/server
                    """
                    // Execute deployment command based on environment selected in parameter 
                    if(params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT == "production1") {
                        env.SERVER = "PRODUCTION1_SERVER_IP"  
                    } else if (params.DEPLOY_ENVIRONMENT == "production2") {
                        env.SERVER = "PRODUCTION2_SERVER_IP" 
                    }
                    
                    sh deployScript  // Deploy to production server
                }    
            }
        }
    }
}
